title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 35 Junior Resident Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 35 Junior Resident Posts. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
